name: The 4 Wary souls (Grave/digger)
description:
"4 fresh eyed teenagers dragged out of their mothers wombs, a cold steel gun in their hands and ill fit boots given."

A squad of 4 conscripts, all trying to live. Some wanting to get out of this hell, others looking elsewhere.

Bernard Esser - The most fresh faced conscript, 18, intending to get out of this war alive.

Ana Raymond - Compared to most, a fanatic of the Royal Nation, propaganda having dug deep into her young mind. 18, despite her fanaticism, she was born weak.

Émile Granger - The most experience, yet the most cowardly. He ran off his first skirmish, ducking officers and the like. 19, and unwanting to fire his gun.

Praskoviya Nikolaeva - The most scarred, the blood, cleaned off her hands, still feels like a burning pain on her hands. 18, and too scarred to fight properly.

They were all given guns, shipped off without a moments notice, the war waiting for them. What shall they go through...?

I'm back...sorry for not posting much, but tada! 4 conscript goobers for you to muck around with.

updaterio 1: I'll probably make if people request it separate bots that focus on the conscripts, but that'll be heck to make so I'll only do it if people request...
creator: Hush!
